name: atomic-os
description: Atomic OS — a 64-tool structured-read + atomic-edit MCP that turns any AI CLI agent into a surgical, verifiable, universal (75-language) code engineer. Every mutation flows through a firewall: sha256 + syntax-validate + char-level trace + protected-file guard + rollback. Content/anchor-addressed editing (no line/column math), multi-file atomic transactions, LSP WorkspaceEdit apply, native ripgrep/glob/tree-sitter, and a bypass-rate meter.
